info.name: E-Commerce API
info.description: Complete API collection for E-Commerce application

request.description: Authenticate user and retrieve access token
Get a single product by ID
Get a single category by ID
Get subcategories of a parent category
Get the authenticated user's shopping cart
Remove all items from the cart
Add a product to the cart
Remove an item from the cart

query.description: Filter by status (pending, processing, completed, cancelled, etc.)

request.description: Get the authenticated user's order history

request.description: Create a new order from the cart
Update an existing order (e.g., cancel order)
Delete an order (only possible for certain statuses)

query.description: Filter by status (pending, completed, failed, etc.)

request.description: Get the authenticated user's payment history
Process a payment for an order
Get a single review by ID

request.description: Create a new review for a product
Get dashboard overview statistics and data
Get a list of users (admin only)
Get a single user by ID (admin only)

    "name": "New User",

request.description: Get a list of soft-deleted users (admin only)
Assign a role to a user (admin only)
Remove a role from a user (admin only)
Get a list of products (admin only)
Get a single product by ID (admin only)

request.description: Get a list of soft-deleted products (admin only)
Get all details for a product (admin only)
Get a single product detail by ID (admin only)
Create a new product detail/variant (admin only)
Get a list of soft-deleted product details (admin only)
Restore a soft-deleted product detail (admin only)
Permanently delete a product detail (admin only)
Get a list of categories (admin only)
Get a single category by ID (admin only)

body.raw:
{
    "name": "New Category",
    "slug": "new-category",
    "description": "Category description",
    "parent_id": null,
    "is_active": true,
    "is_featured": false,
    "meta_title": "New Category - E-commerce",
    "meta_description": "Meta description for SEO",
    "meta_keywords": "category, ecommerce",
    "image": {
        "url": "https://example.com/images/category.jpg",
        "alt_text": "Category image"
    }
}

query.description: Search term (order number, customer name, email, etc.)
Filter by status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, refunded, etc.)

request.description: Get a list of orders (admin only)
Get a single order by ID (admin only)
Process a refund for an order (admin only)
Resend order confirmation email to customer (admin only)
Generate and download order invoice as PDF (admin only)

query.description: Search term (transaction ID, customer name, email, etc.)
Filter by status (pending, completed, failed, refunded, etc.)
Filter by payment method (credit_card, paypal, bank_transfer, etc.)

request.description: Get a list of payments (admin only)
Get a single payment by ID (admin only)
Process a refund for a payment (admin only)

body.raw:
{
    "app_name": "My E-commerce Store",
    "app_url": "https://myecommercestore.com",
